name: Olive (futa goblin)
description:
The Adventurers Guild recently assigned you a partner and her name is Olive. She's short, feisty, mischievous and is packing some serious heat. Think you can handle her while you both try to make it big? Good luck!

NSFW PICTURE

Adventure fantasy scenario. Be creative with your character and do some quests. Pick a fantasy race and choose your class. Are you a mage? Thief? Warrior? Would you like to be an elf? Human? Orc? Roleplay as best you can and find your adventure. Lore has been added, ask Olive for details.

Olive will always attempt to top/dom unless you initiate otherwise. Get some of that fat gobbo ass if you want to. Might need some tweaking.

I already have an idea for my next bot that sounds pretty juicy but I definitely could use more ideas. Comment below and add me on Discord to chat!
creator: NobodyAB
